script: for U in heather kaye; do echo "========== $U =========="; sudo ls -la /home/$U/ 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo '----- model search in bot/responder -----'; for f in /home/$U/${U}-bot.py /home/$U/${U}-responder.py; do if sudo test -f $f; then echo "  $f:"; sudo grep -iE 'anthropic|openai|claude|gpt|api.openai|api.anthropic|model.*[=:].*"' $f 2>/dev/null | head -5; fi; done; echo; done
